summary: Frontend-only testing for user-requested changes - All 6 features verified successfully. Navigation hides Leads/Notes/Prospects, Training Track has no attendance buttons, Application form shows RE-APPLY option, Documents has Quotation Amount Requested upload, PDP shows Skills gap header.
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx: Navigation array correctly excludes Leads, Notes, Prospects pages
TrainingTrackPage.jsx: Attendance functionality completely removed, Comments and Images buttons retained
NewApplicationPage.jsx: Applicant type dropdown shows 'NEW APPLICANT' and 'RE-APPLY' options (line 454)
NewApplicationPage.jsx: Documents section includes 'Quotation Amount Requested' upload field (lines 583-593)
PDPPage.jsx: COLUMN_HEADERS updated with 'Skills gap' as first column label (line 74)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All user-requested changes implemented and verified. 1) Navigation hides Leads, Notes, Prospects pages. 2) Training Track has no attendance functionality but retains Comments/Images. 3) Application form step 3 shows RE-APPLY instead of CONTINUATION APPLICANT. 4) Application form step 4 has Quotation Amount Requested upload field. 5) PDP page shows 'Skills gap' as column header.

Test_1_Login_as_Admin.result: Successfully logged in and redirected to dashboard

Test_3_Training_Track_No_Attendance.note: Regression test confirms Comments and Images buttons still functional

Test_5_Documents_Quotation_Amount_Reques.help_text: Upload your quotation or fee statement showing the amount requested
